notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper brick colors/points, ball physics, paddle angle control, audio, and win/lose states; minor issue is keyboard movement double-applies when mouse is active due to redundant input block.
The game is highly functional and visually authentic, but keyboard controls become permanently disabled and jittery the moment the mouse enters the canvas.
A solid Breakout implementation with working core loop and no obvious crashes, but control handling is slightly messy and collision/physics are not polished enough to merit top scores.
